message:
fix(snapshot): use else-if for mutually exclusive dirty-field branches in DiffSnapshotEngine

When a pane has multiple dirty fields, the engine previously emitted both
a PaneStateChanged diff (which already includes the full state with
scrollback) AND a separate PaneScrollbackChanged diff for the same pane.
The scrollback-only diff is redundant when the full state change already
carries the updated scrollback_ref. Changed the independent `if` to
`else if` so PaneScrollbackChanged is only emitted when scrollback is
dirty but a full state change was not already produced.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
